subcodes.first_line: The Daystar of Divine Beauty hath risen from the dawning-place of ancient glory and shineth upon all created things. Happy art thou, who hast been illumined by its splendours.
subcodes.first_line_orig: شمس جمال الهی از مشرق غیب ربانی طالع شده و بر جمیع ممکنات مشرق گشته فیا طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mystical themes
